ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_category" TEXT /* Category of the sector (e.g., public, private, hybrid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value (e.g., 2010, 2015) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Value of energy consumption */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., Historical, Projected) */,
  "consumption_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., MW, GW) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_energy_consumption" (
  "total_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total consumption record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "total_consumption" REAL /* Total energy consumption */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of total energy consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_energy_consumption_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "scenario_type" TEXT /* Type of scenario (e.g., baseline, high growth, low growth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_details" (
  "scenario_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario detail */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Projected energy consumption */,
  "projection_type" TEXT /* Type of projection (e.g., historical, projected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_details_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_details_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_details_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_category" TEXT /* Category of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, population growth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., Historical, Projected) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation in millimeters */,
  "sunlight_hours" REAL /* Total sunlight hours */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "weather_station_location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technology_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology impact */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "impact_value" REAL /* Impact on energy consumption */,
  "technology_type" TEXT /* Type of technology (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy impact */,
  "policy" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "impact_value" REAL /* Impact on energy consumption */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., regulatory, incentive-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_reports" (
  "scenario_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_reports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_reports_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access */,
  "permission_status" TEXT /* Status of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
